metadata.name: Model Documentation Requirements
metadata.description: Ensures all models have proper documentation including technical specs, validation reports, and ownership information

rules.name: Model documentation exists
rules.description: Every model must have associated documentation with a valid URL
rules.remediation: Upload model documentation to the approved document repository and provide the URL

rules.name: Documentation reviewed within 365 days
rules.description: Model documentation must be reviewed at least annually
rules.remediation: Schedule and complete annual documentation review

rules.name: Model owner assigned
rules.description: Every model must have a designated owner
rules.remediation: Assign a model owner in the model inventory

rules.name: Technical specification complete
rules.description: Models must have complete technical specifications
rules.remediation: Complete the technical specification including methodology, inputs, and outputs
